languages.text: {n}Вскоре группа разведки докладывает, что обнаружила разбившийся шаттл с едва различимыми знаками отличия Астра Милитарум на борту.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Вскоре группа разведки докладывает, что обнаружила разбившийся шаттл с едва различимой инсигнией {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизиции{/g} на борту.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The reconnaissance squad soon reports that they have located the crashed shuttle with a barely recognisable Astra Militarum insignia on the hull.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вскоре группа разведки докладывает, что обнаружила разбившийся шаттл с едва различимыми знаками отличия Астра Милитарум на борту.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The reconnaissance squad soon reports that they have located the crashed shuttle with a barely recognisable Astra Militarum insignia on the hull.{/n}
{n}The reconnaissance squad soon reports that they have located the crashed shuttle with a barely recognisable Inquisition insignia on the hull.{/n}
{n}The reconnaissance squad soon reports that they have located the crashed shuttle with a barely recognisable Inquisition insignia on the hull.{/n}
{n}The reconnaissance squad soon reports that they have located the crashed shuttle with a barely recognisable Astra Militarum insignia on the hull.{/n}

languages.text: {n}偵察隊はすぐに、わずかに認識できるインキジシオンの紋章が船体に描かれた墜落したシャトルを発見したと報告した。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The reconnaissance squad soon reports that they have located the crashed shuttle with a barely recognisable Inquisition insignia on the hull.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kısa bir süre sonra keşif mangası, gövdesinde zar zor seçilen bir Astra Militarum nişanı bulunan düşmüş mekiğin yerini tespit ettiklerini bildiriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The reconnaissance squad soon reports that they have located the crashed shuttle with a barely recognisable Astra Militarum insignia on the hull.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kısa bir süre sonra keşif mangası, gövdesinde zar zor seçilen bir Astra Militarum nişanı bulunan düşmüş mekiğin yerini tespit ettiklerini bildiriyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}侦察小队很快回报，他们已定位到坠毁的穿梭机，其船体上有一个几乎无法辨认的星界军徽章。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The reconnaissance squad soon reports that they have located the crashed shuttle with a barely recognisable Astra Militarum insignia on the hull.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}侦察小队很快回报，他们已定位到坠毁的穿梭机，其船体上有一个几乎无法辨认的星界军徽章。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Aufklärungstrupp meldet wenig später, dass er das abgestürzte Shuttle mit kaum noch erkennbaren Insignien des Astra Militarum lokalisieren konnte.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The reconnaissance squad soon reports that they have located the crashed shuttle with a barely recognisable Astra Militarum insignia on the hull.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Aufklärungstrupp meldet wenig später, dass er das abgestürzte Shuttle mit kaum noch erkennbaren Insignien des Astra Militarum lokalisieren konnte.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Rapidement, l'équipe de reconnaissance vous signale avoir localisé l'épave de la navette, dont la coque arbore un emblème à peine reconnaissable de l'Astra Militarum.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The reconnaissance squad soon reports that they have located the crashed shuttle with a barely recognisable Astra Militarum insignia on the hull.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Rapidement, l'équipe de reconnaissance vous signale avoir localisé l'épave de la navette, dont la coque arbore un emblème à peine reconnaissable de l'Astra Militarum.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La unidad de reconocimiento no tarda en informar de que han encontrado la lanzadera estrellada, que lleva una insignia casi irreconocible del Astra Militarum en el casco.{/n}
